text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I sure am! Yesterday, I invited everyone in the
dorm to a party full of food and fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: We all ate a whooole lot of yummy food and had a great time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And now I feel super buono and energetic! I'm
going to nail training today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sure sounds like Hishi Akebono had a blast
during her time off!
